name: dynalloc
description: AI-Powered Adaptive Linux Resource Manager — daemon Linux untuk CPU core pinning, priority scheduling, memory/IO/network QoS dinamis berbasis PSI (Pressure Stall Information).

scripts.test: node --test test/unit/test-all.js test/unit/test-policy-engine.js test/unit/test-network-controller.js test/unit/test-system-plugin.js test/unit/test-learning-logger.js test/unit/test-per-app-profiles.js test/unit/test-kde-wayland-plugin.js test/integration/test-integration.js test/integration/test-policy-integration.js
scripts.test:unit: node --test test/unit/test-all.js test/unit/test-policy-engine.js test/unit/test-network-controller.js test/unit/test-system-plugin.js test/unit/test-learning-logger.js test/unit/test-per-app-profiles.js test/unit/test-kde-wayland-plugin.js
scripts.syntax-check: bash -c 'fail=0; for f in *.js policy-engine/*.js plugins/*.js detectors/*.js profiles/*.js adaptive/*.js recognition/*.js monitoring/*.js sdk/*.js lib/*.js lib/controllers/*.js intelligence/*.js scripts/*.js test/unit/*.js test/integration/*.js; do [ -f "${f}" ] && node --check "${f}" || fail=1; done; exit ${fail}'
scripts.verify:all: bash -c 'for s in verify-fixes verify-foreground verify-medium-features verify-memory-cgroup verify-pid-reuse verify-ppd verify-thermal verify-actuator-api verify-controller-isolation verify-network-qos verify-detector-layer verify-resource-controller-layer verify-profile-manager verify-adaptive-switching verify-workload-recognition verify-monitoring-framework verify-plugin-sdk verify-v1_1_0; do node "scripts/${s}.js" || exit 1; done'
